docket_entries.description: CRC 3.740 REVIEW
NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $315.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT EMMA ZIEGLER AKA EMMA DOROTHY ZIEGLER
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-04-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION FOR ORDER VACATING DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE IS GRANTED. PURSUANT TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION, THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT ENTERED NOVEMBER 29, 2012 IS VACATED. IN OPEN COURT, THE COURT SIGNS THE ORDER VACATING THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT SUBMITTED WITH THE MOVING PAPERS, WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE SECOND PARAGRAPH DISMISSING THE CASE. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE ITS OWN REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL WITH THE CLERK'S OFFICE. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Vacating Default Judgment And Dismissing Case Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Dec-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Motion For Order Vacating Default Judgment And Dismissing Case Without Prejudice IS Granted. Pursuant to Plaintiff's motion, the default judgment entered November 29, 2012 is vacated. IN OPEN COURT, The Court SIGNS the order vacating the default judgment submitted with the moving papers, with the exception of the second paragraph dismissing the case. Plaintiff must file its own request for dismissal with the clerk's office. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is taken off-calendar by the court because of no appearance despite a hearing
was required. The moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. No opposition filed. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
